nodes.label: Calendar Management

nodes.description: A calendar used by a school to track events

nodes.description: The process of adding or editing calendar events

nodes.description: The name or title of a calendar event

nodes.label: Category

nodes.description: A team responsible for providing technical support

nodes.label: Integration
nodes.description: The process of connecting different systems or technologies

nodes.label: User

nodes.label: Event
